channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenyan Man Sentenced to Nine Years for Forging Documents and Exporting Wildlife Products
item.description: Nairobi — Peter Omwangala Atepe has been sentenced to nine years in prison for illegally exporting wildlife products and forging official wildlife documents. The ruling came from Principal Magistrate ...

item.title: Clinical Trial Finds Sulthiame Reduces Breathing Pauses in Sleep Apnea Patients
item.description: A European clinical trial led in part by the University of Gothenburg has found that the drug sulthiame can significantly reduce breathing interruptions in people with moderate to severe obstructive s...

item.title: DOE Investigates Gas Stations for Excessive Fuel Price Hikes
item.description: The Department of Energy (DOE) is currently investigating around 500 complaints from consumers regarding fuel retailers allegedly increasing gasoline and diesel prices beyond allowed limits amid globa...

item.title: DepEd addresses technical issues in Unified Science High School pilot exam
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) has acknowledged technical glitches that occurred during the pilot run of the Unified Science High School Admission Test (USHAT). According to DepEd, some examinees...

item.title: Bunge Girls Secondary School Empowers Students with Clean Cooking Energy Club
item.description: For real, life at Bunge Girls Secondary School in Dodoma has changed proper. Before, the kitchen smoke from firewood used to choke everybody and cooks like Maria Joseph would finish their shift with s...

item.title: Lachie Neale’s AFL future unclear as potential move to WA faces new club interest
item.description: Brisbane Lions midfielder Lachie Neale’s future is in flux following a highly publicised personal scandal and his recent split from Jules Neale. The 31-year-old, a two-time Brownlow medallist and back...

item.title: CBSE clarifies: Exams are not rescheduled amid US-Iran-Israel conflict
item.description: Recently, a fake circular claiming that CBSE exams had been rescheduled appeared on social media, causing panic among students and parents. The circular referenced the ongoing US-Iran-Israel conflict ...

item.title: Nigerian Soldiers Successfully Repel Terrorist Attack in Yobe Military Base
item.description: The Nigerian Army don talk say their troops don successfully repel one coordinated terrorist attack wey happen for Goniri, Gujba Local Government Area of Yobe State. The attack, wey happen between nig...

item.title: KeNHA Advises Drivers on Alternative Routes Ahead of Safari Rally in Naivasha
item.description: Kenya National Highways Authority (KeNHA) has issued a traffic advisory ahead of the Safari Rally, warning motorists to prepare for heavy congestion as thousands head to Naivasha from March 12 to Marc...

item.title: KwaDukuza Residents Demand Better Service Delivery Ahead of Local Elections
item.description: Residents of KwaDukuza are increasingly frustrated by ongoing service delivery failures, and many are hoping for change in the upcoming 2026 local government elections. The town is governed by the Kwa...

item.title: Health Canada Reviews Two Fatal Reactions at Winnipeg Plasma Donation Centres
item.description: Two individuals, including a 22-year-old international student, died after donating plasma at for-profit collection centres in Winnipeg, according to Health Canada. The incidents occurred in October 2...

item.title: Tanzania Trains Health Workers to Improve Use of Maternal and Child Health Equipment
item.description: Tanzania government is taking serious steps to boost maternal and child healthcare services by training health workers on proper use of medical equipment. The Ministry of Health organised a special tr...

item.title: PM Shehbaz visits Saudi Arabia to discuss regional security and strengthen ties
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has departed for Saudi Arabia to meet Crown Prince Mohammad Bin Salman for talks on the ongoing tensions in the Middle East following the US-Israel war on Iran...

item.title: Ukraine offers battle-tested low-cost drone interceptors to US and Gulf states in exchange for Patriot missiles
item.description: Amid escalating conflicts in the Middle East, where Iranian-designed Shahed drones are straining US and Gulf air defences, Ukraine has positioned itself as a key player by offering its domestically de...

item.title: Sixth Container Ship Damaged in Suspected Attack Near Dubai Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: A container ship was struck by a suspected projectile off the coast of Dubai, marking the sixth such incident in recent days amid escalating tensions in the US-Israel-Iran war that began in late Febru...

item.title: Tambuwal Resigns From PDP, Joins ADC Citing Internal Party Crisis
item.description: Former Sokoto State Governor, Aminu Tambuwal don officially resign from Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) and join African Democratic Congress (ADC). He post the announcement for 𝕏 early Thursday, expla...

item.title: Iranian attacks on Gulf shipping and infrastructure push oil prices to $100 per barrel amid escalating Middle East conflict
item.description: The article provides live updates on the intensifying US-Israel war with Iran, now in its second week as of 12 March 2026. Iranian forces have launched multiple attacks on commercial vessels in the Gu...

item.title: Persian Gulf States Navigate Strategic Challenges Post-Iran Conflict
item.description: Once the US-Israeli conflict with Iran concludes, Persian Gulf countries will confront a complex strategic environment. Despite aligning with the US for security and engaging diplomatically with Iran ...

item.title: Senators raise security concerns over Islamabad Safe City surveillance system
item.description: In Islamabad, the Senate Standing Committee on Information Technology raised concerns about the security of the city’s Safe City surveillance system. The discussion was prompted by recent reports of t...

item.title: WNBA and Players’ Union Continue Negotiations Amid Key Disagreements on Revenue and Benefits
item.description: The WNBA and its players’ union resumed negotiations on Wednesday following a 12-hour marathon session that ended early Wednesday morning without an agreement on a new collective bargaining agreement ...
